articles.title: run Midland petrol station after they send message over 'double whammy'
articles.description: D.C Edginton & Sons operate the family-run business on the Alcester Road in Studley, Warwickshire

articles.title: 2026 Maruti Brezza facelift launching on July 24: Expected price, Boosterjet engine, panoramic sunroof, features and all you need to know
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki will launch the 2026 Brezza facelift on July 24. The updated SUV receives cosmetic changes and new interior features. A potential 1.0-litre Boosterjet turbo-petrol engine may also debut. Existing safety features are expected to remain strong for buyers. This facelift aims to enhance its competitive edge in the market.

articles.title: Man Sets Wife Ablaze For Refusing To Prepare Tea, Gets Life Imprisonment
articles.description: A Bhopal district court sentenced Pritam Meena to life imprisonment for burning his wife, Durga, alive after she refused to make tea because she was unwell. Before dying, Durga told police her husband poured petrol on her, set her ablaze, and threatened to kill her after she sought rest.

articles.title: Pakistan's fuel pricing shake-up: Petrol pump owners threaten strike over govt's daily price revisions
articles.description: Pakistan had moved from fortnightly to weekly fuel price revisions following the outbreak of the US-Iran conflict in late February.

articles.title: E20 fuel debate intensifies: Former HPCL chief says ethanol blend won’t cut petrol prices
articles.description: Former HPCL CMD MK Surana says ethanol blending offers an important economic advantage by helping cushion fuel prices when international crude oil markets experience sharp volatility, thereby improving price stability

articles.title: Good morning, North Bay! Here's today's weather!
articles.description: Here's a look at the current local weather and gas prices

articles.title: Escalating Conflict in the Gulf: Iran Strikes at US and Allies
articles.description: Iran launched multiple attacks on US allies, including strikes on US facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain, following a ceasefire collapse. The conflict has raised concerns of regional destabilization, affecting global oil prices and civilian infrastructure. The potential for a full-scale war looms as both sides engage in retaliatory actions.

articles.title: US and Iran exchange strikes as they struggle over Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes on Saturday, intensifying their battle for the Strait of Hormuz. Kuwait intercepted Iranian missiles and drones, while Iraq and Jordan also reported downed projectiles. US airstrikes hit electricity and desalination plants in Iran's Hormozgan province. Iran effectively closed the strait to shipping traffic after the war started. The conflict has caused oil prices to surge and disrupted global trade routes.

articles.title: Kuwait says Iran has struck a water desalination plant, the second such attack in 2 days
articles.description: United States and Iran exchanged strikes targeting infrastructure and military sites. Kuwait, Iraq, and Jordan reported intercepting Iranian missiles and drones. The conflict intensified over control of the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway. Oil prices rose as shipping through the strait saw a significant decline. Both nations continue their military actions with no clear end in sight.

articles.title: Teens pour petrol on customers and set them on fire in horror UK restaurant attack
articles.description: Two people were left with critical burn injuries after two teenagers poured petrol over customers before setting fire to an east London restaurant
